name: HackerNews Trend Extractor & Report Generator
description: Fetches trending HackerNews discussions via Exa search, uses Claude AI to transform raw threads into human-readable insights, and saves a formatted report to Google Sheets. Adapted from n8n's HackerNews-to-Google-Docs workflow.

source.originalName: Extract & transform HackerNews data to Google Docs using Gemini 2.0 flash

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for searching HackerNews

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving the report

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID to save the report

sheetName.description: Sheet tab name for the report

topics.description: Comma-separated topics to search for on HackerNews

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting summary

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the summary

steps.name: Build Exa search query for HackerNews topics
Build Claude prompt for HN analysis
Build Google Sheets rows from analysis
Save HN trend data to Google Sheets
Build Slack summary of HN trends
Post HN trend summary to Slack
